title: 弥生賞の後に・次こそ絶対！

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! I couldn't win the race... I couldn't beat
Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I was so sure I'd win! I really, really, really wanted
to win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Next time, at the Satsuki Sho... I'll beat you
again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So you better show me a performance that's
worth beating, just like today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her tears, Winning Ticket stares
resolutely back at Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I won't lose next time! I promise! Absolutely NOT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We start training for the next race, the Satsuki
Sho, where even stronger opponents are sure to
be.
